mapper.select: SELECT menu_btn_seq AS menuBtnSeq, menu_seq AS menuSeq, btn_seq AS btnSeq, btn_nm AS btnNm, use_yn AS useYn FROM tb_menu_btn WHERE menu_seq = #{menuSeq} ORDER BY btn_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_menu_btn (menu_seq, btn_seq, btn_nm, use_yn, rgst_user_seq, rgst_date_time, upt_user_seq, upt_date_time) VALUES (#{menuSeq}, #{btnSeq}, #{btnNm}, #{useYn}, #{rgstUserSeq}, now(), #{uptUserSeq}, now())
